qualifications.name: Bachelor of Engineering BEng - Civil Engineering
notes: Qualification code: B6CISQ.
Qualification group: Bachelor of Engineering BEng.
Campus: APK.
Career paths: Plan, design and construction of infrastructure.

Faculty notes: The Faculty of Engineering and the Built Environment offers Engineering Technology and Engineering Science undergraduate and postgraduate programmes; Engineering and Engineering Technology programmes are supported by the Engineering Council of South Africa (ECSA); Town and Regional Planning is supported by the South African Council for Planners (SACPLAN); Mine Surveying is supported by the South African Council for Professional and Technical Surveyors (PLATO); Construction Management is supported by SACPCMP and SACQSP; Quality and Operations Management programmes are not subject to accreditation by professional bodies.

NCV admission summary: {beng_degree: NCV level 4 issued by the Council for General and Further Education and Training, Minimum 70% for 5 of the 7 subjects, Minimum 70% in English as Language of Teaching and Learning / First Additional Language, Minimum 70% in Mathematics and Physical Sciences; Diploma: NCV level 4 issued by the Council for General and Further Education and Training, Minimum 60% for 6 of the 7 subjects, Minimum 70% in English as Language of Teaching and Learning / First Additional Language, Minimum 60% in Mathematics and Physical Sciences.
Additional UJ requirements: Technical Science not accepted.
